title: ForceSprint
description: Were you ever annoyed cause your sprint toggle randomly turned off? Well, this is the way to solve it!
body:
# ForceSprint

ForceSprint is a lightweight Fabric mod that adds a highly useful feature: Forced Sprint.

## What does it do?
This mod automatically keeps your player sprinting. No more holding down the sprint key — as long as the server allows it, you'll be sprinting constantly.

## How does it work?
ForceSprint simulates pressing the sprint key in your controls, ensuring you sprint continuously whenever possible. It respects server-side restrictions, so it won’t override server rules or cause unintended behavior.
